title: rubus × praevenustus
intro: Rubus × praevenustus, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is a cross between the white-fruited raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the red-fruited raspberry (Rubus idaeus var. idaeus). The leaves and roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × praevenustus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, due to its rich content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. Herbal preparations of Rubus × praevenustus include infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
